metadata.description: Living project memory for Claude Code — never lose context to a /compact or a restart again.

plugins.name: ledger
plugins.description: An always-on set of living files that auto-catch-up at session start and auto-snapshot at every compaction and session end. Five non-blocking hooks keep your goals, tracker, decisions, mistakes, and exact next step current — so every session, even one after a /compact, knows precisely where things stand. Includes an auto-generated HTML dashboard. Never coerces work; only remembers.
